verilator.policy: DUT lint must be warning-clean. Testbench-only Verilator 4.x timing-delay warnings STMTDLY and INFINITELOOP are allowed for lint-only checks because iverilog executes the timed behavioral testbench.

numeric_policy.child_sequence: token_loop_axi_decoder_block_fixture called twice with start_i held while busy and release-waited

timing_margin_note: Prior AXI decoder-block token-loop routed timing had WNS 1.348 ns, WHS 0.009 ns, WPWS 2.225 ns, 132 bonded IOB, and status was 64 bits. This model FSM fixture keeps status at 64 bits and avoids exposing child vectors, AXI data, AXI debug buses, or KV arrays.
verilator_status_policy: Verilator lint result recorded when verification.enable_verilator is true
vivado_timing_status_policy: post-route with non-NA setup/hold/pulse-width when synthesis is enabled
vivado_resource_status_policy: utilization.rpt emitted when Vivado synthesis completes
timing_caveat: Routed timing is fixture timing without board-level I/O delay, DDR/AXI shell, or PS/PL integration constraints; it is not board-level ZCU104 signoff.
omitted_operations: layer-dependent KV-cache accumulation across full sequence length
DDR/AXI packed-weight streaming and full DDR controller integration
true SiLU or exponential activation math in RTL
